name: spec-driven-development
description: Spec-first workflow: research unknowns, write abstract requirements in SPEC.md, get approval, implement, verify completeness.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-first workflow: research unknowns, write SPEC.md, get approval, implement, verify completeness.
interface.longDescription: Install a shared, skill-first plugin for spec-driven development. Use this skill when the user explicitly asks to follow a spec-first workflow, write a SPEC.md before implementing, or use a spec-first approach. Covers the full lifecycle: research external unknowns, author SPEC.md, pass review gates, implement against the approved spec, and verify completeness.
defaultPrompt: Follow the spec-driven development workflow to plan and implement this change.
Write a SPEC.md for the requested feature before writing any code.
If external framework, library, or topic behavior is unclear, document that research in RESEARCH.md before finalizing the spec.
